steps.name: Given  Close tutorial screen
Then  Welcome screen is opened
When  Close welcome screen
Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
Then  Account "LYRASIS Reads" is present on Accounts screen
When  Enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
Then  Login is performed successfully
When  Open Catalog
And  Open search modal
When  Search 'available' book of distributor 'Axis 360' and bookType 'AUDIOBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  Switch to 'Audiobooks' catalog tab
And  Open AUDIOBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
Then  Check that book contains LISTEN action button on book details screen
steps.statusMessage: Button 'Listen' is not present on book details screen. Error (if present) -
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Button 'Listen' is not present on book details screen. Error (if present) - 
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.BookDetailsSteps.checkThatBookContainsActionButton(BookDetailsSteps.java:125)
	at ✽.Check that book contains LISTEN action button on book details screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/AudiobookLyrasis.feature:447)

steps.name: When  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
When  Select 2X playback speed on playback speed audiobook screen
Then  Current playback speed value is 2X on audio player screen
When  Return to previous screen from audio player screen
And  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
And  Current playback speed value is 2X on audio player screen
When  Restart app
And  Open Books
And  Open AUDIOBOOK book with LISTEN action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo on books screen
And  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
And  Current playback speed value is 2X on audio player screen
When  Tap play button on audio player screen
And  Save book play time as 'timeAhead' on audio player screen
And  Save chapter time as 'chapterTimeKey' on audio player screen
And  Wait for 5 seconds
Then  Playback has been moved forward by 10 seconds from 'timeAhead' and 'chapterTimeKey' seconds on audio player screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Playback speed: Check of playback speed
